title: Graph a circle from its features
description: Given information about the center and radius of a circle, graph it.
topic_path: Graph a circle from its features

assessment_items.question_content:
**Graph the circle which is centered at $(-1,-3)$, and which has the point $(-7,-3)$ on it**.

[[☃ interactive-graph 1]]
hints:
**In order to graph this circle, we drag its center to the point $(-1,-3)$, and stretch the circle so that the point $(-7,-3)$ lies on the circle**. 



[[☃ image 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Graph the circle which is centered at $(3,-2)$ and has a radius of $5$ units**.

[[☃ interactive-graph 1]]
hints:
**In order to graph this circle, we drag its center to the point $(3,-2)$, and stretch the circle so that the distance between the center and any point on the circle is $5$ units**. [[☃ explanation 1]]
